entries.definition:
كتاب الصَّاد

صدر - صدع

(صدع) الصاد والدال والعين أصلٌ صحيحٌ يدلُّ على انفراجٍ في الشيء. يقال صَدَعْتُهُ فانصدَعَ وتصدَّعَ. وصَدَعْتُ الفلاةَ: قطعتُها. ودليلٌ هادٍ مِصدَع.

part; to place in the front or on the highest place; to return, or go back; to issue forth, to proceed. Of this root, four forms occur 46 times in the Qurʾan: يَصْدُر yaṣdur once; يُصْدِر yuṣdir once; صدر ṣadr 10 times and صدور ṣudūr 34 times.
يصدر yaṣdur [imperf. v., intrans.] to issue forth, to come forth, to go forward (99:6) يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ النَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا on that Day, people will issue forth [out of their graves] in separate groups.

يصدر yuṣdir [imperf. of v. IV, intrans./trans.] to turn back, to make something/someone move (off/away), to drive away/off (28:23) لَا نَسْقِي حَتَّىٰ يُصْدِرَ الرِّعَاءُ وَأَبُونَا شَيْخٌ كَبِيرٌ we do not water [our flock] until the shepherds drive [their herds] away, our father is an old man’.

صدر ṣadr [n.; pl. صدور ṣudūr] 1 chest, bosom, heart (7:2) كِتَابٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِي صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ a book that has been sent down to you [Prophet]—let there be no anxiety in your heart about it; *(11:5) يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ they conceal their enmity, they hide their thoughts [lit. they fold up their breasts]; *(4:90) حَصِرَتْ صُدُورُهُمْ they became averse, they have a dilemma [lit. their chests became constricted]; *(100:10) وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِي الصُّدُورِ when the secrets are brought out [lit. what is in the bosoms is gathered]; *(20:25) اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي ease the constriction of my heart, lift up my heart; *(10:57) شِفَاءٌ لِّمَا فِي الصُّدُورِ a healing for what is in the hearts [of humankind]; *(26:13) يَضِيقُ صَدْرِي my chest becomes constricted, I feel constrained, I become dumb-founded 2 mind, thought, heart (114:5) الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ he who insinuates [his evil suggestions] into the hearts of humankind.

entries.definition:
ṣ-d-ʿ to cleave, to split; to cause a headache; to disperse, to scatter; to traverse, to cross from one side to the other, to journey; crack, fissure, cleavage; scattering, standing out; to comply with, to attain to. Of this root, five forms occur once each in the Qurʾan: اصدع iṣdaʿ; يَصَّدَّعُونَ yaṣṣaddaʿūn; يُصَدَّعُونَ yuṣaddaʿūn; مُتَصَدِّع mutaṣaddiʿ and صدع ṣadʿ.
اصدع iṣdaʿ [imper. v. with prep. بـ] attain to, comply with; reveal, distinguish between; disperse (15:94) فَاصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ

516

516
